config._comment_class: Debezium connector class for PostgreSQL — reads WAL (Write-Ahead Log) change events
config._comment_user: PostgreSQL user — must have REPLICATION privilege to read the WAL
config._comment_dbname: PostgreSQL database to capture changes from
config._comment_topic_prefix: Prefix for all Kafka topics produced by this connector — topics are named <prefix>.<schema>.<table>
config._comment_table_include: Whitelist of tables to capture in <schema>.<table> format — all other tables are ignored
config._comment_plugin: PostgreSQL logical decoding plugin — pgoutput is the built-in plugin (no extension needed), alternative is decoderbufs
config.plugin.name: pgoutput
config._comment_time_precision: Use Kafka Connect logical types for dates/times (org.apache.kafka.connect.data.Date etc.) instead of Debezium-native types (io.debezium.time.Date). Required for downstream connectors (e.g. Iceberg sink) to correctly map DATE columns to Iceberg date type instead of integer.
config._comment_key_converter: Serialize Kafka message keys as JSON (the primary key of the row)
config._comment_value_converter: Serialize Kafka message values as JSON (the full Debezium change event envelope with before/after/op fields)
